title: Tanstic 2.5 Inch x 10 Yards Gold Swirl Glitter Wired Ribbon Organza Sheer Ribbon with Glitter Swirl Pattern and Metallic Edge for Tree Decoration Gift Wrapping
features: What You Will Get: You will get 1pcs gold swirl glitter wired ribbon, 2.5 inch wide, 10 yards long.

Reliable Material: Swirl glitter wired ribbon is made of organza ribbon, tightly woven, not easy to tear or fall apart, bright colors, not easy to fade, comfortable to touch, easy to mold, can be used with confidence.
Exquisite Design: The swirl glitter wired ribbon has exquisite patterns and sparkling sequins for a glossy finish, with threaded edges on both sides, adding unique charm to the decorated items.

Good Performance: The swirl glitter wired ribbon is wrapped around a paper roll for easy storage, organization, and carrying. Swirl glitter wired ribbon is 2.5 inches wide and 10 yards long, enough to meet your usage needs.

Wide Application: Perfect for Christmas, New Year's Day, Valentine's Day, birthdays, anniversaries, parties, weddings, can be used to decorate venues, Christmas trees, bouquets, gifts, to create a sense of atmosphere, add sophistication and romance.
description: Tanstic 2.5 Inch x 10 Yards Gold Swirl Glitter Wired Ribbon Organza Sheer Ribbon with Glitter Swirl Pattern and Metallic Edge for Tree Decoration Gift Wrapping 💥Specification: ❥Product Type: Swirl Glitter Wired Ribbon ❥Material: Organza Ribbon ❥Color: Gold ❥Dimensions: 2.5 inch/63mm in width, 10 yards/9.15m in length ❥Quantity: 1pcs 💥Features: ✅ Our set contains 1pcs gold swirl glitter wired ribbon for 10 yards long to meet your usage needs. ✅ The swirl glitter wired ribbon is wrapped around a paper roll for easy storage, organization, and carrying. ✅ Swirl glitter wired ribbon is soft and easy to shape into the shape you want, meeting your decorative needs. 📦Package List: ❥1pcs------Gold Swirl Glitter Wired Ribbon Note: There could be some deviations due to manual measurements or slight color difference as the result of photographing scene.
